summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Production Hardening features: Health Dashboard, Alert Delivery, and Background Worker APIs and UI tabs. All 42 unit tests pass, 18/18 API tests pass, and all frontend tabs render correctly with proper data-testid attributes.

minor.issue: Returns 502 when HotelRunner sandbox is unavailable (external dependency)
May return 502 if reservation_import fails (external dependency)

critical_code_review_comments: Health Dashboard API correctly returns connector health with scores, uptime, sync rates
Alert Delivery CRUD operations working correctly with proper 404 handling
Background Worker job execution working for health_check, inventory_sync, metrics_aggregation
Frontend tabs use proper data-testid attributes for testing
ConnectorHealthTab shows health cards with proper classification (HEALTHY/DEGRADED/CRITICAL)
AlertDeliveryTab shows channels list with test/delete actions
BackgroundWorkerTab shows job type cards with run buttons and recent jobs table
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing connector data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production hardening features fully tested. Health Dashboard shows 5 connectors (1 degraded, 4 critical). Alert Delivery has 1 'Test Slack' channel. Background Worker shows completed jobs. API tests saved to test_production_hardening_api.py. Note: reservation_import job fails with 502 due to HotelRunner sandbox returning 401 - this is expected as external credentials may not be configured.
passed_tests: UI: Health Dashboard tab renders with connector cards and health scores
UI: Alert Delivery tab renders with channels list and Add button
UI: Background Worker tab renders with job type cards and recent jobs table
UI: All tabs have proper data-testid attributes
